Task setup script and evaluation script explicitly define and check this exact path.
General documentation for Tor Browser and task setup script confirm that it uses port 9150 for its SOCKS5 proxy.

privileged_info_summary: The task instructions and evaluation scripts confirm that the agent must write a bash script at /home/ga/Documents/tor_scraper.sh. This script is required to download responses from https://check.torproject.org/api/ip to /home/ga/Documents/tor_ip.json and from the DuckDuckGo onion site (https://duckduckgogg42xjoc72x3sjasowoarfbgcmvfimaftt6twagswzczad.onion/) to /home/ga/Documents/ddg_onion.html. The agent must configure curl to route through the SOCKS5 proxy on port 9150, which is confirmed via web search as the default Tor Browser SOCKS5 port.
